👑 Premium Halal Since 2026

Our Story

Welcome to The Chicken Palace

★

We provide fresh, hygienic, halal chicken with trusted quality and fast service. At The Chicken Palace, every piece is carefully selected, hygienically processed, and freshly delivered.

We take pride in offering premium poultry that meets the highest halal standards, so your family eats with confidence every single day.

Located at Post Katgoan, TQ & Dist Latur, Maharashtra — we serve our community with love. Your trust is our pride.

✅ 100% Halal 🧼 Hygienic 🚀 Fast Service ❄️ Fresh Daily 💰 Best Prices

Our Promise

Pure Chicken · Pure Taste · Pure Trust

★

Swaad aisa, yaad rahega — Har bite mein royal maza aayega.

Every day we bring you the freshest halal chicken, processed in a clean and hygienic environment, served with the warmth of a royal welcome.

🕌 Halal Certified 🌅 Fresh Every Day 👑 Royal Quality 💚 100% Natural
